title: Initialize target security-agent workspace
description: Create TARGET_REPO/.security-agent with config, target path contract, tool config, and task evidence before any recon or discovery work.

title: Run Ghost repo context against target
description: Use the local ghost-repo-context skill against TARGET_REPO before native recon imports Ghost context.
acceptance: Ghost repo context skill was invoked for TARGET_REPO, not SECURITY_AGENT_HOME
Generated or missing Ghost repo context is recorded under TARGET_REPO/.security-agent/kb/ghost-context.json
Ghost skills loaded from ghost/skills/plugins/ghost are recorded under TARGET_REPO/.security-agent/integrations/ghost/skills.json

title: Run native recon with supporting tools
description: Run recon with --prepare-tools so GitNexus, Semble, codeTree detection, repo map, dependencies, entrypoints, graph fallback, and threat model artifacts exist before source-level analysis.

title: Run Ghost discovery scans against target
description: Use local Ghost scan-deps, scan-secrets, and scan-code skills against TARGET_REPO before native discovery imports Ghost findings.
acceptance: No ghost-validate or ghost-proxy workflow was invoked

title: Run native discovery and import Ghost evidence
description: Run native discovery after Ghost scans so OpenGrep, focused agents, and Ghost normalized findings all land in canonical finding artifacts.

title: Run triage and reconcile native plus Ghost findings
description: Run harsh native triage with dedup, reachability, exploitability, impact, false-positive challenge, severity panel, and Ghost reconciliation.

title: Generate final MVP and Ghost summaries
description: Run report generation after triage and include Ghost evidence summary when present.
acceptance: TARGET_REPO/.security-agent/reports/ghost-summary.md exists or the report records no Ghost evidence
Final operator summary references artifacts, not bulk source context

title: Run codeTree structural analysis
description: Use codeTree MCP against TARGET_REPO before broad source reading so agents consume tree-sitter structure, symbols, imports, functions/classes, and route/controller shape as an intermediary artifact.
acceptance: codeTree MCP was invoked against TARGET_REPO or a blocker was recorded
TARGET_REPO/.security-agent/evidence/graph/codetree-structure.json exists or the blocker explains why codeTree was unavailable
codeTree evidence paths are under TARGET_REPO, not SECURITY_AGENT_HOME

title: Run GitNexus recon graph analysis
description: Run GitNexus graph/index/query preparation against TARGET_REPO and preserve the graph evidence before discovery or triage.
acceptance: TARGET_REPO/.security-agent/evidence/graph/gitnexus-analyze.json exists or a GitNexus blocker is recorded
TARGET_REPO/.security-agent/evidence/graph/gitnexus-query.json exists or a GitNexus blocker is recorded

title: Run Semble targeted retrieval
description: Run Semble MCP/CLI targeted retrieval against TARGET_REPO for entrypoints, authz, data access, shell/file/crypto/secrets surfaces before source-level browsing.
acceptance: TARGET_REPO/.security-agent/evidence/graph/semble-searches.json exists or a Semble blocker is recorded

title: Run OpenGrep SAST
description: Run OpenGrep against TARGET_REPO and preserve raw JSON output before normalization and triage.
acceptance: TARGET_REPO/.security-agent/evidence/tool-runs contains an OpenGrep tool-run record or raw artifact records OpenGrep unavailable
OpenGrep findings are normalized into TARGET_REPO/.security-agent/findings/normalized/findings.json when present

title: Run Cognium security semantic SAST
description: Run Cognium security-only semantic SAST against TARGET_REPO/src with tests excluded and preserve raw JSON before triage.
acceptance: Cognium command uses --category security and --exclude-tests, or raw artifact records Cognium unavailable
Cognium exit code 1 is treated as findings-present rather than tool failure

title: Run Ghost repo context against target (2026-05-25 run)
description: Use the local ghost-repo-context skill against TARGET_REPO to generate repo.md before native recon imports Ghost context.
acceptance: repo.md is present under .security-agent/evidence/ghost/ or ghost output dir
repo context is imported into canonical workspace

title: Run Ghost discovery scans against target (2026-05-25 run)
description: Use local Ghost scan-deps, scan-secrets, scan-code, and report skills against TARGET_REPO.

title: Run contained toolchain preflight
description: Verify all active workflow tools, Ghost binaries, MCP launchers, caches, and templates are contained under VulnOps before target analysis.
acceptance: Ghost scanner binaries are checked under bins/ghost for macOS and Linux
OpenCode launcher is checked under bins/opencode for macOS and Linux
opencode.jsonc uses bins/shims launchers instead of bare package-runner or global tool commands
Ghost skill files do not reference global Ghost home paths
Scan-run artifacts are restricted to TARGET_REPO/.security-agent or /tmp

title: Run strict mandatory coverage gates
description: Run MCP, scanner, Ghost, and harness gates before recon; default complete scans fail as coverage_incomplete when a required gate is blocked.
acceptance: Default run stops before recon when required gates are blocked unless --allow-degraded is explicit

title: Verify contained portable toolchain
description: Generate toolchain.lock.json and identify not_portable_blocker entries for missing contained binaries or unredirectable state.
acceptance: All required entries include path, checksum or not_portable_blocker
No required tool falls back to global PATH
security-agent toolchain verify reports portable true or explicit blockers

title: Run generic sensitive exposure discovery
description: Detect sensitive data leaks through logs, telemetry, debug output, error output, responses, and config dumps without steering to a single known finding.
acceptance: Sensitive exposure findings normalize into findings/normalized/findings.json
Discovery report includes sensitive exposure coverage through source-agent counts
